prompt: The cold pass keeps failing with a 403 error from HuggingFace. The hot pass works fine. What's going on?

assertions.text: Correctly identifies this as a pyannote gated model access issue
Mentions the HF_TOKEN environment variable requirement
Directs user to accept the model license at the HuggingFace model page
Explains why hot pass works (uses whisper, no pyannote) while cold pass fails (uses pyannote diarization)
Mentions that cold pass can still work without diarization (graceful fallback)
